title: Class for Circle
text:
Complete the program to define a Circle class with a constructor (radius) and an area() method. Read radius and print the area (use π = 3.14159).

Input format:
A single float radius (0 < r ≤ 10⁴)

Output format:
The area as a float (round to 2 decimal places)

Example:
Input:
5

Output:
78.54
